name: ultraeval
description: Evaluate a skill or codebase with a multi-agent workflow, then generate grounded, AI-exploitable fix docs and a TDD backlog. A skills.sh agent skill.
author: maxgfr

scripts.check:build: tsup && node scripts/copy-bundle.mjs && git diff --exit-code -- scripts/ultraeval.mjs skills/ultraeval/scripts/ultraeval.mjs && node scripts/verify-skill-bundle.mjs
scripts.demo: node scripts/ultraeval.mjs init --target tests/fixtures/target-lib --out /tmp/ultraeval-demo --kind codebase --category library && node scripts/ultraeval.mjs plan --run /tmp/ultraeval-demo
